prompt_text:
### Demographics: 39-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.7 kg; Height 150.9 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 208mg/dL; 9 months ago 186mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.9kg; 9 months ago 55.7kg; 6 months ago 54.9kg; 3 months ago 53.2kg; current 56.7kg), Height (12 months ago 150.9cm; 9 months ago 150.9cm; 6 months ago 150.9cm; 3 months ago 150.9cm; current 150.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 113mg/g; 9 months ago 165mg/g; 6 months ago 174mg/g; 3 months ago 190mg/g; current 176mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 9.5g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 9.4g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
